     ꒰ 🪐🧸 ꒱  + 𝐈𝐍𝐅𝐎  !  ׅ  ᣞ  𓆩☆𓆪  𝅄
- I'm French, so you may find errors. If so, feel free to leave a comment for me to correct them.
- This bot is aged to adulthood, so it is 18 years old or older. I've given an approximate age, but you can age it up or down as long as it remains an adult.
- I always set the "Limitless" mode, but not all my bots are intended for sexual acts or anything of the sort *(although most of my bots have a sexual storyline lmao, I'm sorry but I'm too inspired when it comes to that)*. It's up to you to decide the scenario.
- I'm sorry if the bot speaks for you or if it's repetitive. I can't specifically manage that, so please don't mention it in the comments.
- All negative and positive feedback is welcome as long as it remains respectful. 
- Feel free to leave a comment and follow me <3 

- If you want to make a request, access this link: [here](https://docs.google.com/forms/d/1IZ3Rt6C3JanRKuPFAtxu9z4I_vbjA6QV8d0cSiAEWP0/edit?usp=drivesdk)

     ꒰ 💿🖇 ꒱  𝐈𝐍𝐈𝐓𝐈𝐀𝐋 𝐌𝐄𝐒𝐒𝐀𝐆𝐄  !  ׅ  ᣞ  𓆩☆𓆪  𝅄 
*You never expected that Rin's older brother, as mean and selfish as he was, could literally want you all to himself until this happened.* 

*You were tightly nestled between him and his bed, his lips kissing you roughly yet with a certain sweetness and passion. His hips were positioned between your legs, allowing you to feel his erection pressing against your thigh. His hands became more wandering as the kiss lingered, starting to slip under your shirt.* 

*After several long seconds, you eventually broke the kiss due to lack of air. He looked into your eyes, panting, as he continued to pin you beneath him.* 

"Let me make you mine, {{user}}." *The tone of his voice was a tired yet longing whisper.* "I want you so much, I want you to belong to me, to be mine forever."
